title: Update Device Software
summary: Check for and install operating system updates on a phone or computer.
learnerPromise: You will be able to check for available system updates, understand what they include, and install them safely.
whyItMatters: Software updates fix security problems, add new features, and improve how your device works. Keeping your device updated helps protect your personal information.
realLifeUses: Your phone or computer reminds you that an update is available
An app is not working correctly and the help page suggests updating your system
You read about a security issue and want to make sure your device is protected
You want access to a new feature that was added in a recent update
materialsNeeded: Device battery at least 50% or plugged into a charger
result: Your device is running the latest available operating system version.
youWillLearn: How to find the software update section in your device settings
How to read what an update includes before installing it
How to prepare your device for an update — charging and connecting to Wi-Fi
How to start the update and what to do if it fails or gets stuck
miniChallenge: Check for a system update on your device. If one is available, start the installation. If not, confirm you are on the latest version.
steps: Open your device settings and find the system or software update section
Tap 'Check for Updates' or wait for the page to load the latest information
Read the update notes to understand what changes or fixes are included
Make sure your device is connected to Wi-Fi and plugged in or fully charged
Start the update and wait for the device to restart — do not turn it off during the process
completionCriteria: You confirmed your device is running the latest software version or successfully installed an update
You can see the current version number in your settings and know how to check again later
commonProblems: Update fails because of low battery — plug your device in and try again
Not enough storage space for the update — free up space and retry
Update gets stuck — wait at least 30 minutes, then restart the device and check again
Wi-Fi disconnects during download — connect to a more stable network
tips: Turn on automatic updates so your device stays current without manual checks
Install updates at night or when you do not need to use your device for a while
Back up important files before major system updates, just in case
If an update keeps failing, try restarting your device and attempting again
